name: Cheetah Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow Black and White - Pillowfort™
description: Add a touch whimsy to your child's room with this Cheetah Weighted Plush Throw Pillow from Pillow fort™. This novelty throw pillow is shaped like a cheetah in fuzzy white adorned with black spots for cute, jungle-inspired vibes. It features a plush polyester-spandex blend exterior and 100% polyester filling for soft comfort, and it makes a cute companion for endless cuddles while also doubling as an adorable decor accent in their room.
